name: conversion-os
description: Conversion OS — the client-operations AI operating system for agencies and consultancies (open beta: full suite, free). A markdown vault becomes your firm's compounding memory: one self-contained workspace per client (brand, ICP, goals, meetings, deliverables, reports), an engagement lifecycle with health scoring, and an agency-level command center. Includes /setup (scaffold + adaptive onboarding), /client (engagement manager), /daily (operating rhythm), /autopilot (scheduled context engine), /audit (vault health), and /team (rollout, seats, sync) — plus a client-delivery library (/lead-research, /lead-qualify, /win-loss, /email-sequence, /email-personalize, /case-study, /seo-audit, /seo-optimize, /ads-audit) whose deliverables write back to the client workspace and re-audit against prior baselines. Solo and Agency modes.
